creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Building in this poudriere jail:

# poudriere jails -l
JAILNAME             VERSION              ARCH    METHOD  PATH
ia64-11              11.0-CURRENT r262690 ia64    svn+https /pdr/jails/ia64-11

With podriere ports tree at r347001.

The build ends with this error:

make zmmcase0 pre=z ta=T tb=N muladd=1 lat=8  loopO=JIK M=76 N=76 K=64 mb=76 nb=76 kb=0  mu=7 nu=4 ku=16 lda=0 ldb=0 ldc=0  lda2=0 ldb2=0 ldc2=0 pfA=1  csA=1 csB=1 csC=2 alpha=1 beta=1  moves="-DMoveA -DMoveB" cleanup=1 mmrout="zmm0.c"  SMC="cc" SMCFLAGS="-fomit-frame-pointer -O2 -fno-tree-loop-optimize -Wl,-rpath=  -fpic -DPIC" DMC="cc" DMCFLAGS="-fomit-frame-pointer -O2 -fno-tree-loop-optimize -Wl,-rpath=  -fpic -DPIC" casnam=res/zCleanK_76x76x64
rm -f zfc.o zmm.o
cc -DL2SIZE=4194304 -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//include/contrib -DAdd_ -DF77_INTEGER=int -DStringSunStyle -DATL_OS_FreeBSD -DATL_ARCH_IA64Itan2 -DATL_CPUMHZ=1500 -DATL_USE64BITS -DATL_MAXNREG=128 -DATL_IntelIccBugs  -DATL_NCPU=2 -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -O -fomit-frame-pointer -Wl,-rpath=  -fpic -DPIC -DzREAL -DtranAT -DtranBN  -DMULADD=1 -DLAT=8 -DJIK  -DMB=76 -DNB=76 -DKB=64  -DMB0=76 -DNB0=76 -DKB0=0  -DKU=16 -DNU=4 -DMU=7  -DLDA=0 -DLDB=0 -DLDC=0  -DLDA2=0 -DLDB2=0 -DLDC2=0  -DcsA=1 -DcsB=1 -DcsC=2  -DALPHA=1 -DBETA=1 -DMoveA -DMoveB  -DPREFA=1 -DCLEANUP=1  -o zfc.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//tune/blas/gemm/fc.c
cc: -rpath=: linker input file unused because linking not done
cc -DL2SIZE=4194304 -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//include/contrib -DAdd_ -DF77_INTEGER=int -DStringSunStyle -DATL_OS_FreeBSD -DATL_ARCH_IA64Itan2 -DATL_CPUMHZ=1500 -DATL_USE64BITS -DATL_MAXNREG=128 -DATL_IntelIccBugs  -DATL_NCPU=2 -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -fomit-frame-pointer -O2 -fno-tree-loop-optimize -Wl,-rpath=  -fpic -DPIC -DATL_BETA=1 -c zmm.c
cc: -rpath=: linker input file unused because linking not done
cc -DL2SIZE=4194304 -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/..//include/contrib -DAdd_ -DF77_INTEGER=int -DStringSunStyle -DATL_OS_FreeBSD -DATL_ARCH_IA64Itan2 -DATL_CPUMHZ=1500 -DATL_USE64BITS -DATL_MAXNREG=128 -DATL_IntelIccBugs  -DATL_NCPU=2 -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -O -fomit-frame-pointer -Wl,-rpath=  -fpic -DPIC -o xzfc zfc.o zmm.o  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/tune/sysinfo/tim====>> Killing runaway build after 7200 seconds with no output
===>  Cleaning for atlas-3.8.4_3,1
====>> Leftover processes:
USER   PID %CPU %MEM   VSZ   RSS TT  STAT STARTED     TIME COMMAND
root 33963  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00 make -C /usr/ports/math/atlas build
root 33988  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00 - make build-message do-build post-build
root 34002  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00 `-- make all
root 94445  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00   `-- make -f Make.top build
root 94559  0.0  0.0 12104     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00     `-- ./xatlas_build -1 0 -a 1
root 78188  0.0  0.0 13376     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00       `-- sh -c make -f Makefile IRunMMDef pre=z 2>&1 | ./xatlas_tee INSTALL_LOG/zMMSEARCH.LOG\n
root 78189  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00         |-- make -f Makefile IRunMMDef pre=z
root 14351  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00         | `-- make install pre=z
root 14352  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00         |   `-- make zinstall
root 14369  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00         |     `-- make res/zXover.h pre=z
root 14370  0.0  0.0  9768     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00         |       `-- make zRun_tfc pre=z
root 19762  0.0  0.0 13376     0  -  IWJ  -        0:00.00         |         `-- /bin/sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/bin/ATLrun.sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/tune/blas/gemm xztfc
root 19763 41.1  0.3 35432 20784  -  RJ    1:42AM 51:53.04         |           `-- /wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/atlas/work/ATLAS/shared/tune/blas/gemm/xztfc
root 78190  0.0  0.0 12064  1624  -  IJ   11:44PM  0:00.19         `-- ./xatlas_tee INSTALL_LOG/zMMSEARCH.LOG
Killed
build of /usr/ports/math/atlas ended at Wed Mar  5 03:41:51 GMT 2014
build time: 17:10:58

Not sure if indicates a problem with the port
or with the poudriere build process.
The machine has 2 CPUs, and the build was
started with:

/usr/local/bin/poudriere bulk -j ia64-11 -J 4 -f /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/pkglist

i.e. with 4 jobs.

The full build log:

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/logs/atlas-3.8.4_3,1.log
